en: I have X on it, 86 and a quarter, six months old.
Today the string will be 36 and a half. Mr. Black...
They called it Black Monday. No shit.
ko: 그들은 이를 블랙 먼데이라고 불렀어. 말도 안 돼.

en: By 4 p.m. the market had dropped 508 points,
the biggest plummet since the crash of 29.
I know your family, you know mine. No, I don't know, some fucking country in Europe took a shit.
ko: 네 가족은 알고, 너는 내 가족을 알아.

en: Let them do what they want to fucking do. Our market's solid. Mr. Colings, this is not something that you want to...
ko: 이건 환상적인 그림들이야. 팔고 싶어하는 게 아니야.

en: You know what happened? A fucking tsunami. I think you're making a big mistake. Mr. Tyson...
Yes, I will talk to your wife. Trust me, do not answer the phone.
A lot of people are going to be calling you, trying to get your dirty laundry. I don't know what's going on here.
ko: 많은 사람들이 너에게 전화할 거야, 너의 더러운 속사정을 캐내려고.
그 테이블에서 나와. 여기서 무슨 일이 일어나는지 몰라. 알아, 알아.
